options.container_background: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 18%, rgba(56,189,248,.22), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 16%, rgba(251,113,133,.24), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 72% 86%, rgba(34,197,94,.18), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, #101318 0%, #18201b 48%, #241b23 100%)

card.html:
Import-ready design JSON

Drag & Drop Test Lab

Et demonstrasjonsdashboard for frie kort, snap-grid, z-index, tabs, layers, HTML, klikk, animasjoner og responsive visninger.

Buttons are live. Long-press or double-click empty canvas to edit.
card.css: .lab-hero{position:relative;min-height:100%;display:grid;align-content:center;gap:18px;padding:26px;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(56,189,248,.22),rgba(34,197,94,.12) 48%,rgba(251,113,133,.18));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16)}.lab-hero:before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:auto -80px -120px auto;width:280px;height:280px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(from 45deg,#38bdf8,#22c55e,#f59e0b,#fb7185,#38bdf8);filter:blur(18px);opacity:.34;animation:spin 10s linear infinite}.lab-hero>*{position:relative}.eyebrow{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a7f3d0;font-weight:800}.lab-hero h1{margin:0;font-size:54px;line-height:.94;color:#fff}.lab-hero p{max-width:48ch;margin:0;color:rgba(226,232,240,.9);font-size:17px;line-height:1.5}.actions{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}.actions button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.actions button:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.16)}.status{font-size:13px;color:rgba(226,232,240,.82)}.lab-hero.is-pulse{animation:heroPulse .8s ease}@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes heroPulse{50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,.22),0 0 50px rgba(56,189,248,.34)}}
card.js: const count=root.querySelector('[data-count]');const status=root.querySelector('[data-status]');const hero=root.querySelector('.lab-hero');let n=0;helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-click]'),'click',()=>{n+=1;count.textContent=String(n);status.textContent='Click event registered: '+n;});helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-pulse]'),'click',()=>{hero.classList.toggle('is-pulse');status.textContent=hero.classList.contains('is-pulse')?'Pulse animation is on':'Pulse animation is off';});return {update(){}};

card.text:
##### QUICKSTART
### 1. Enter edit mode
Double-click empty space or long-press.

### 2. Drag, resize, snap
Use the 20 px grid, selection marquee and card toolbar.

###### Import keeps your current storage_key by default.

card.title: Interactive HTML card
card.html:
HTML + JS

Trykkbare knapper uten egne entities

Dette kortet endrer lokal UI-state direkte i dashboardet.

Ready
card.js: const box=root.querySelector('.click-card');const out=root.querySelector('[data-out]');let armed=false;helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-main]'),'click',()=>{armed=!armed;box.classList.toggle('is-armed',armed);out.textContent=armed?'Demo armed: animation class applied':'Demo disarmed: state reset';});helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-alt]'),'click',()=>{out.textContent='Secondary button clicked at '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString();});return {update(){}};

card.text: This import file intentionally includes overlapping cards, active layer memberships, animated line cards, SVG connector paths, left tabs, particle background settings, fixed viewport sizing and mobile responsive geometry.

card.title: Mini drag lab
card.html:
dragresizesnap

Cards here are HTML, but the imported dashboard itself is ready for native drag and resize in edit mode.
card.css: .motion-lab{height:100%;display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr auto auto;gap:14px}.mini-grid{position:relative;min-height:270px;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.08) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.08) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:20px 20px;background-color:rgba(2,6,23,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)}.mini-grid.glow{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(56,189,248,.28),0 0 34px rgba(56,189,248,.2)}.tile{position:absolute;display:grid;place-items:center;border-radius:16px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}.a{left:34px;top:38px;width:180px;height:90px;background:#38bdf8}.b{left:250px;top:130px;width:220px;height:112px;background:#22c55e}.c{left:150px;top:210px;width:150px;height:78px;background:#fb7185}.motion-lab.play .a{animation:moveA 1s ease both}.motion-lab.play .b{animation:moveB 1s ease both}.motion-lab.play .c{animation:moveC 1s ease both}.toolbar{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}button{border:0;border-radius:14px;padding:12px 14px;background:#f59e0b;color:#111827;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}button+button{background:#38bdf8}.motion-lab p{margin:0;color:rgba(226,232,240,.82);line-height:1.45}@keyframes moveA{50%{transform:translate(120px,70px)}}@keyframes moveB{50%{transform:translate(-120px,-70px) scale(1.08)}}@keyframes moveC{50%{transform:translate(150px,-145px)}}
card.js: const lab=root.querySelector('.motion-lab');const grid=root.querySelector('.mini-grid');const copy=root.querySelector('[data-copy]');helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-shuffle]'),'click',()=>{lab.classList.remove('play');void lab.offsetWidth;lab.classList.add('play');copy.textContent='Animation replayed. In edit mode, the real cards snap to the same 20 px rhythm.';});helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-grid]'),'click',()=>{grid.classList.toggle('glow');copy.textContent=grid.classList.contains('glow')?'Grid glow is on':'Grid glow is off';});return {update(){}};

card.html:
Connector overlaySVG paths can sit above cards

The orange dashed route is not a normal card. It is imported through options.connectors and follows the active tab.

card.text: Tip: switch to edit mode and drag a selection marquee across several cards. The layout supports multi-select, group movement, resize handles, card duplication, z-order controls and per-card settings.
Layers: turn groups on and off

card.title: Content layer
card.html:
ContentPrimary dashboard objects

Cards with no layer always remain visible, while assigned cards can be filtered from the layer bar.

card.text:
### Annotation layer
Piler, forklaringer og hjelpetekster kan toggles separat fra hovedinnholdet. Slukk `Annotations` i layerbaren og se pilene forsvinne.

card.title: Viewport cards
card.html:
Desktop1440 x 900Wide freeform canvas
Tablet820 x 1180Portrait profile included
Mobile430 x 932Stacked geometry included

card.text: The JSON contains a fixed desktop canvas plus tablet and mobile portrait coordinates. Import it, then use the viewport/device controls in the card settings to inspect how the same card IDs move between layouts.
